description: CRITICAL: ALWAYS call this tool - NEVER make up, guess, or fabricate data. Cancel an appointment. Use this tool directly only when a single call to this tool is sufficient to complete the user's request; for any sequence of two or more tool calls, use the `batch_action` tool instead.

partnerClientCode.description: Optional partner client code to call APIs on behalf of a specific partner office/sub-client. Only use when explicitly requested by the user.
